expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Let workspace admins manage members and inspect membership activity.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Recording membership audit data",
      "description": "As an admin, I want membership changes recorded so the workspace keeps an audit trail.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership changes create audit records",
        "Audit records include action, actor, target, and timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/audit-log.ts",
        "src/workspace/migrations/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Inviting workspace members",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite members by email so I can add people without database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin can submit an invite by email",
        "Invite creates a pending or active membership record",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/invite-member.ts",
        "src/workspace/components/invite-member-form.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Changing member roles",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member role so I can adjust access from viewer to editor or admin.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role changes persist the selected role",
        "Allowed roles are viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/change-member-role.ts",
        "src/workspace/components/member-role-select.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoking workspace access",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke a member so I can remove access when needed.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoking access removes or disables the member in the workspace",
        "Revocation is recorded in the audit trail",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/revoke-member-access.ts",
        "src/workspace/components/revoke-access-button.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Viewing membership audit history",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so I can see who changed access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page shows recent membership audit entries",
        "Audit view includes invite, role change, and revoke events",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/audit-view.tsx",
        "src/workspace/settings/page.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/audit-view.tsx",
        "src/workspace/settings/page.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
